name: gstack
description: Garry's Stack — Claude Code skills. One repo, one install, entire AI engineering workflow.

scripts.build: bun run gen:skill-docs --host all; bun build --compile bin/gstack-global-discover.ts --outfile bin/gstack-global-discover && chmod +x bin/gstack-global-discover && rm -f .*.bun-build || true
scripts.slop: npx slop-scan scan . 2>/dev/null || echo 'slop-scan not available (install with: npm i -g slop-scan)'
